vegan-blueberry-basil-smoothie.name: Vegan Blueberry Basil Smoothie
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Combine blueberries, water, basil, lime juice, and sweetener in a blender; blend until smooth.'}

vegan-oatmeal-cookies-recipe-comedera.name: Vegan Oatmeal Cookies Recipe
vegan-oatmeal-cookies-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de galletas de avena veganas
instructions: Inicia tu receta y pela la banana. Corta en rodajas y vierte en un bol.
With the help of a fork, you're going to shredded them into a well creamy purée.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
It incorporates into the bowl where the banana, oatmeal and flakes are.
He later adds 3 tablespoons of cajuous butter and 3 tablespoons of cinnamon powder.
Con la ayuda de una cuchara, vas a mezclar muy bien hasta que obtengas una masa cremosa e integrada.
Cubre una bandeja con papel de cocina.
Take two spoons and you will make the oatballs and place onto the plate with paper and kitchen.
Once you have them all ready, bake them for about 20 minutes till they're golden. When it's been about 15 minutes, look at the cookies and see if they're ready or they're ready to bake till 20m.
Saca del horno, deja reposar.
Enjoy!

vegan-pumpkin-brownie.name: Vegan Pumpkin Brownie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
Blend pumpkin puree, 1 1/2 tablespoons coconut oil, 3 tablespoons orange juice, nutmeg, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Refrigerate pumpkin swirl until needed.
Combine hot water and flaxseed meal in a small bowl. Stir and let soak for about 5 minutes.

Combine flaxseed mixture, almond flour, sugar, 3 tablespoons orange juice, 1 1/2 tablespoons coconut oil, and vanilla extract in a blender and process. Transfer to a bowl. Stir melted chocolate, pecans, baking powder, salt, and pepper into brownie mixture.
Spread brownie mixture into the prepared baking pan. Spread pumpkin swirl on top. Run a knife through the mixture to create a pretty marbled look.

Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Cover the baking pan with aluminum foil and return to the hot oven. Bake until brownies are set, about 20 minutes more. Cool completely before slicing and serving, about 30 minutes. Store in the refrigerator.

vegan-spicy-cashew-crema.name: Vegan Spicy Cashew Crema
instructions: Place cashews in a bowl and pour filtered water over top until completely covered. Soak for at least 2 hours or overnight.

Drain and rinse cashews, then place into a food processor bowl. Add 1/2 cup water, lime juice, vinegar, garlic salt, ground chile pepper, and paprika. Blend for 1 minute. Add remaining 1/4 cup water if necessary for desired consistency; blend until smooth, 3 to 4 minutes. Taste and adjust for flavor.

vegetable-kimchi.name: Vegetable Kimchi

ingredients.item: Crunchy vegetable of choice (such as daikon
ingredients.prep: radishes, kohlrabi, cucumbers, carrots, or green beans)
cut on a diagonal into 1-inch pieces
or 4 0.5 teaspoons crushed red pepper flakes, ground in a spice mill

instructions: Toss vegetables, salt, and sugar in a large bowl. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour and up to 3 hours to allow juices to release.

Add scallions, gochugaru, garlic, fish sauce, and ginger; toss until well coated. Divide kimchi between jars, making sure to distribute liquid evenly and leaving 1" headspace. Eat immediately or let sit on countertop 2 days to allow fermentation to begin before refrigerating. Flavors will deepen over time.
Do Ahead: Kimchi can be made 2 months ahead. Cover and chill. Open occasionally to release accumulated gas.

vegetable-paella-recipe-comedera.name: Vegetable Paella Recipe
instructions: To start with, cut off all the vegetables you're about to use. The onion and pepper into small cubes, you can add some extra pepper into strips to decorate. The garlic also in very small pieces.
Las alcachofas, puerros y habas las puedes picar en trozos medianos a tu gusto.
If you are to add another ingredient, cut them into medium-sized pieces as well.
Now get a paeling frying pan and put it on medium / high heat with a generous jet of olive oil.
Comienza a pochar la cebolla, el pimiento y el ajo. Procura que no se quemen.
Agrega el tomate rallado, las alcachofas, los puerros y las habas verdes.
Mezcla un par de minutos y pon el arroz.
Add the 2 cups of stock, salt, pepper and some saffron to your taste.
Revuelvo un poco y deja que hierva a fuego alto.
When the fluid's evaporate and as soon as some bubbles are on the surface, put the fire down to a minimum and cover.
Deja cocinar unos 20 minutos y luego apaga y permite que tu paella de verduras repose antes de servir.

vegetable-soup.name: Vegetable Soup

ingredients.prep: bottom stems trimmed, sliced into  0.5” strips (about 4 cups)

ingredients.item: Torn basil leaves and grated parmesan

instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven or small stockpot over medium heat. Add pancetta and cook, stirring often, until pancetta is lightly browned around the edges and fat is partially rendered, about 5 minutes. Add onion, carrot, celery, and potato and season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until vegetables are softened and onion is translucent, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, lightly breaking them up with your hands as you add to the pot; add chicken broth, bay leaf, and Parmesan rind. Bring to a simmer, season with salt and pepper, and add kale. Simmer until potatoes and kale are tender, 10–15 minutes. Remove from heat and add pasta, rice, and/or grains. Serve with basil, grated Parmesan, and a drizzle of olive oil.

vesper.name: Vesper
instructions: Stir gin, vodka, and Lillet Blanc in an ice-filled mixing glass until very cold, about 30 seconds. Strain cocktail through a Hawthorne strainer or a slotted spoon into a martini glass.

Using a small serrated knife, remove a 1" strip of peel from lemon (some white pith is okay); it should be stiff enough to provide some resistance when bent. Twist over drink to express oils; discard. Garnish with a lemon twist.

vietnamese-grilled-pork-skewers.name: Vietnamese Grilled Pork Skewers
instructions: Combine pork belly, 1 red chile pepper, lemongrass, 3 tablespoons fish sauce, 3 cloves garlic, 1 teaspoon MSG, 1 teaspoon white sugar, and five-spice powder in a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until marinated, 1 to 3 hours.

Mix 1/4 cup fish sauce, 1/4 cup sugar, 1 red chile pepper, lime juice, 5 cloves garlic, and 1 teaspoon MSG together in a bowl. Let sit until dipping sauce flavors meld, 30 minutes to 1 hour. Pour in water.
Thread the marinated pork belly onto bamboo skewers.
Preheat grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate. Cook pork skewers, turning occasionally, until crisp, 8 to 10 minutes. Serve with the dipping sauce.
